Species-Gnome — Male Gnome Fighter: 5
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 10 (+0) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 13 (+1) Charisma: 13 (+1)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Chaotic Good Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Intelligence: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 6864/14000 Level: 5 Size: Small Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes:
Ability Boosts: 3 to distribute
Tactical Mind: Can add 1d10 to a failed ability check, expending a use of Second Wind if the result is a success
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +3
Feat Count: Fighting Style; General Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighter Primary Ability); Fighter (Fighter Subclass); Gnome (Gnomish Lineage)
Feats: Alert; Archery Gnome Features: Darkvision; Forest Gnome; Gnome Spellcasting Ability; Gnomish Cunning; Gnomish Lineage; Intelligence; Rock Gnome Fighter Features: Action Surge; Armor Training (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Champion; Dexterity; Extra Attack; Fighter Primary Ability; Fighter Subclass; Fighting Style; Improved Critical; Remarkable Athlete; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion; Perception, Survival); Tactical Mind; Tactical Shift; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Fighter Primary Ability: 1 selection
Fighter Subclass: 1 selection
Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Gnomish Lineage: 1 selection
Darkvision: R60' Sees one light level better
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +3 Insight: (wis) +4 Performance: (cha) +1
Animal Handling: (wis) +4 Intimidation: (cha) +1 Persuasion: (cha) +1
Arcana: (int) +2 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +5
Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) +1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +0
Deception: (cha) +1 Nature: (int) +2 Stealth: (dex) +0
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +1 Survival: (wis) +1
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Animal Handling; Insight; Perception, Survival; Religion
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Skill Notes:
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Remarkable Athlete: Has advantage on Athletics
Combat
Hit Points: 24 Initiative: +3 Armor Class: 18
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Chain Mail Shield: Shield Weapons: Rapier (+4 1d8+1 P; Vex); Scimitar (+4 1d6+1 S; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+4 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +3 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +5
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Action Surge: Can take an extra action once per short rest
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Improved Critical: Scores a possible critical on a natural 19
Remarkable Athlete: Has advantage on initiative and can move 15' after scoring a critical hit without provoking opportunity attacks
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+5 hit points 3 times per long rest; can regain 1 use after a short rest
Small: Has disadvantage on attacks with heavy weapons
Tactical Shift: Using Second Wind allows moving 15' without provoking opportunity attacks
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 4 chosen kinds of Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +1; Constitution: +4; Dexterity: +0; Intelligence: +2; Strength: +4; Wisdom: +1
Save Notes: Gnomish Cunning: Has advantage on Charisma, Intelligence, and Wisdom saves
Magic
Attack: C: +4; Gnome: +5 Spell DC: C: 12; Gnome: 13
Spells:
Mending (Rock Gnome0 [Rock Gnome] Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Minor Illusion (Forest Gnome0 [Forest Gnome] Illu): R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min
Prestidigitation (Rock Gnome0 [Rock Gnome] Tran): R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Speak With Animals (Forest Gnome1 [Forest Gnome] Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Magic Notes:
Forest Gnome: Knows the Minor Illusion cantrip and can cast Speak With Animals 3 times per long rest
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Rock Gnome: Knows the Mending and Prestidigitation cantrips and can spend 10 min and use Prestidigitation to create a Tiny clockwork device that lasts 8 hr
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 3 available vs. 5 allocated
